markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, review process, and holiday schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Review Process Proposed:** To accelerate publishing, GrowthX proposed a "publish first, refine later" model, with PMMs reviewing only high-performing articles. Alexis will discuss this with the PMM team.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [**Publishing Blocked:** Three articles are ready for publication, but two are blocked: one by a missing CMS file (`Vector Similarity Explained`) and another by a duplicate topic (`Vector Search`).](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [**POC Transition:** Erik O'Brien will become the main point of contact, taking over from Aida Knezevic as the project enters Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:** Syncs pause for two weeks (Dec 25 & Jan 1), with async updates provided. Meetings resume the first full week of January.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Publishing

  - [**Problem:** The current PMM review process is a bottleneck, delaying publication.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A "publish first, refine later" model.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritize publishing to gather real-world traffic data, then use that data to identify and refine high-performing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [**Validation:** A recent PMM review for the "Stream Processing" article confirmed this approach is viable, as feedback was minor (a definition tweak) and did not require a full rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Status of Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Ready to Publish (3):** Staged in CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [**Blocked (2):**](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
          - [`Vector Similarity Explained` (refresh): The original article cannot be found in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
          - [`Vector Search`: A duplicate of a recently published internal article.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**In Review (3):** Two with Allison, one with Jim (PMM).](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**New Submissions (5):** Shared yesterday; PMM review is on hold until early January due to holiday bandwidth.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### Blocked Article Solutions

  - [**`Vector Similarity Explained` (CMS Issue):**](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Action:** Alexis will ask the web team to locate the article.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Contingency:** If the original file is unrecoverable, publish the refresh as a new article and set up a 301 redirect from the old URL to the new one.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**`Vector Search` (Duplicate Topic):**](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Decision:** Do not publish the GrowthX version to avoid content overlap.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Contingency:** If the internal article underperforms, merge the two versions to create a single, stronger piece.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Project & Process Updates

  - [**Performance Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Timing:** Begin reviewing the Looker dashboard once 4–5 new articles are live.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Action:** Add performance reviews to future weekly syncs to identify and double down on successful content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Featured Image Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [**Status:** Pipeline created in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Images appear blurry; this is due to large file size, not low resolution.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Action:** Alexis will ask the brand team to provide individual design elements (e.g., logos, icons) for better quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Publish the 3 ready articles today.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard with new article data.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [Send 5 articles next week; pause submissions for the week of Dec 29.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [Follow up with Funglin in Slack regarding the new review process.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [**Alexis:**](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Ask the web team to locate the `Vector Similarity Explained` article in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Discuss the "publish first" review model with the PMM team in early January.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [Request individual design elements from the brand team for featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/5_QW9GsT5RmP8Dxox-8_yb-HmzysyKrC?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
